name: card
title: Card
description: A container card with header, content, and footer sections.

docs.overview: Card groups related content with a styled container. Use CardHeader, CardContent, and CardFooter for structured layouts.
docs.accessibility: Cards are semantic containers. Ensure headings are properly labeled.

platformNotes.macos: Renders as a VStack with native styling.
platformNotes.web: Renders as a styled container div.

examples.name: default
examples.title: Basic Card

agent.summary: Card is a container for grouping related content and actions.
layoutHints: Use Card for distinct sections in a dashboard
Stack cards vertically for a feed layout
